title: Inbox accepts unsigned requests — no HTTP signature verification
description: handle_inbox() in server.rs has a ponytail comment noting signature verification is skipped. Any remote server (or attacker) can send fake Follow/Undo Follow requests. Must verify HTTP signatures on all inbound inbox POSTs by: parsing the Signature header, fetching the sender's public key from their actor document, verifying the signature using signatures::verify_signature(). Reject unsigned/invalid requests with 401.
close_reason: Media pipeline (MIME sniff, resize, EXIF strip, blurhash), actor key cache with TTL+invalidation, inbox signature verification, --media CLI, webhook media fetch, feed enclosure attachments, graceful shutdown
